assertions.description: VideoFrame is exposed as a constructor so authors can introspect frame metadata.
VideoFrameInit accepts a numeric rotation field that round-trips on the resulting frame.
VideoFrameInit accepts a boolean flip field that round-trips on the resulting frame.
Frames constructed without explicit rotation default to 0.
assertions.test: (()=>{const c=new OffscreenCanvas(2,2);const f=new VideoFrame(c,{timestamp:0});const r=f.rotation;f.close();return r===0;})()

assertions.description: Frames constructed without explicit flip default to false.
assertions.test: (()=>{const c=new OffscreenCanvas(2,2);const f=new VideoFrame(c,{timestamp:0});const v=f.flip;f.close();return v===false;})()

assertions.description: EncodedVideoChunk is exposed (sibling interface used in same orientation-aware pipeline).
